title: anagallis monelli var. schousboei
intro: Anagallis monelli var. schousboei, also known as the pink pimpernel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Primulaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, and has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Anagallis monelli var. schousboei is often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions.
